channel.title: Create FortiGate VMs :: SE How-To Build Lab
channel.description: RDP to OOB. ​ from Terminal in OOB This copies bootstrap ISO’s to Proxmox server Creates the FGT VM’s on Proxmox Starts the VM’s just created cd /home/fortinet/automation/ansible/fortinet ./copy_fgt_bootstrap_iso.sh ../vars/all-hosts.yml <PVE server name> ./create-vm.sh ../vars/all-hosts.yml <PVE server name> fortigate_sdwan v7.6.3.F ./start_remove_vm.sh ../vars/all-hosts.yml <PVE server name> fortigate_sdwan started ​ from Terminal in OOB This step pulls gets your FortiFlex tokens from FortiCare and places them in .lic files
